title: Hello World
description:
Print the text `Hello, World!` exactly as shown.

**Input:** None.

**Output:** A single line containing `Hello, World!`

title: Sum of Two Numbers
description:
Read two integers on a single line separated by a space. Print their sum.

**Input:** Two integers A and B (−10⁹ ≤ A, B ≤ 10⁹).

**Output:** A single integer: A + B.

title: Even or Odd
description:
Read an integer and determine if it is even or odd.

**Input:** A single integer N (−10⁶ ≤ N ≤ 10⁶).

**Output:** Print `Even` if N is even, or `Odd` if N is odd.

title: Factorial
description:
Compute the factorial of a non-negative integer N.

The factorial of N is defined as N! = 1 × 2 × 3 × … × N. By convention, 0! = 1.

**Input:** A single integer N (0 ≤ N ≤ 12).

**Output:** A single integer: N!

title: Fibonacci
description:
Print the N-th term of the Fibonacci sequence (1-indexed).

The Fibonacci sequence is: 1, 1, 2, 3, 5, 8, 13, 21, …

**Input:** A single integer N (1 ≤ N ≤ 30).

**Output:** A single integer: the N-th Fibonacci number.

title: Palindrome Check
description:
Check whether a word is a palindrome. A palindrome reads the same forwards and backwards.

**Input:** A single word (lowercase letters only, 1 ≤ length ≤ 100).

**Output:** Print `Yes` if the word is a palindrome, or `No` otherwise.

title: Count Vowels
description:
Count the number of vowels (a, e, i, o, u) in a given string. Uppercase and lowercase vowels both count.

**Input:** A single line containing a string (1 ≤ length ≤ 1000).

**Output:** A single integer: the number of vowels.

title: Reverse a String
description:
Read a string and print it in reverse order.

**Input:** A single line containing a string (1 ≤ length ≤ 1000, no leading or trailing spaces).

**Output:** The string reversed.

title: FizzBuzz
description:
Print the FizzBuzz sequence from 1 to N.

For each number from 1 to N:
- If divisible by both 3 and 5, print `FizzBuzz`
- If divisible only by 3, print `Fizz`
- If divisible only by 5, print `Buzz`
- Otherwise, print the number itself

**Input:** A single integer N (1 ≤ N ≤ 100).

**Output:** N lines, one per number.
outputs:
1
2
Fizz
4
Buzz
Fizz
7
8
Fizz
Buzz
11
Fizz
13
14
FizzBuzz

title: Maximum of an Array
description:
Find the largest number in a list of integers.

**Input:** The first line contains an integer N (1 ≤ N ≤ 1000). The second line contains N integers separated by spaces (−10⁶ ≤ each value ≤ 10⁶).

**Output:** A single integer: the maximum value in the list.
